overview.name: Shrivarshaa Sakhamuri
overview.title: Frontend Developer & DevOps Engineer
description: I’m an AWS Certified Solutions Architect Associate and an enthusiastic Cloud & DevOps Engineer who loves building things that scale — whether it’s cloud-native infrastructure, dynamic web apps, or AI-driven solutions.

I recently graduated with a Master’s in Computer Science from the University of Texas at Arlington, finishing with a 4.0 GPA and a specialization in Artificial Intelligence and Cloud Computing. During my time at UTA, I worked as a Graduate Teaching Assistant, mentoring 30+ students and deepening my own skills by helping others grow. Along the way, I’ve had hands-on experience designing and deploying cloud solutions using AWS services like EC2, S3, Lambda, and Kubernetes, and I’ve built scalable Pega-based automation systems during my internship. On the software side, I’ve developed full-stack web applications with React, Next.js, and Node.js, integrating secure logins, real-time features, and end-to-end testing to create smooth user experiences.

Beyond the code, I’m passionate about solving problems creatively, learning continuously, and blending tech with impact — whether that’s through optimizing systems in the cloud, mentoring, or bringing innovative ideas to life.
